meaning: vi.延期,休会,换另一 个地方vt.使中止,推迟
examples: Let us adjourn to next room.
The meeting will adjourn sine die.
Why don't we adjourn to the local hostelry?
Defence counsel described the prosecution's application to adjourn the hearing as "suspicious to say the least".
"It's the Crown's application to adjourn to get Mr Markus to the court, " she said.
